instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall engage torque converter lock-up during steady cruising.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall engage torque converter clutch when vehicle speed exceeds Lockup_Speed.

expected_output: IF Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Gear_Position < Third_Gear THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disengage lock-up during braking.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall release torque converter clutch when Brake_Pedal_Status is active.

expected_output: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released AND Vehicle_Speed > Lockup_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Engage
IF Vehicle_Speed < Unlock_Speed THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
IF Brake_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN TCC_Command = Disengage
